MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS ADRIANNA ANDREUCCI and ALAN MORTON'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set No. One, Special Interrogatories, Set No. One And Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. The responses are late and all objections are therefore deemed waived. Verified written responses, without objections, shall be served within 15 days of the service of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions are granted against plaintiff and his counsel jointly and severally in the amount of $1,110.00. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.
